title: Wagg
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Wagg''' was an individual who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] and [[New Republic Intelligence Service|Intelligence Service]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Wagg served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Meridian (shuttle)|''Meridian'']].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
